examples: Fourteen passengers on the Amtrak train were killed, as well as the Amtrak engineer and lounge car attendant.
Ridership on Amtrak has jumped by 18% over the past two years.
A cheap ticket with Aer Lingus took me to Boston, followed by Amtrak south.
Amtrak's eVouchers are perhaps the worst product introduced by a major travel brand in recent memory.
On the one hand, virtually every factory on the Amtrak route has been shuttered.
